User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user or administrator in the IntelliSecureX system, managing roles and core profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

username.description: The unique username of the user.

email.description: The unique email address of the user, used for login and identification.

role.description: The role of the user within the system, either 'Admin' or 'User'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Stores metadata about a document uploaded by a user, including its storage location, file type, and security processing status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who uploaded the document. (Relationship: User 1:N Document)

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

storagePath.description: The URI or path where the actual document content is stored in server storage or cloud storage (e.g., Firebase Storage, S3).

uploadDate.description: Timestamp when the document was uploaded.

securityStatus.description: The current processing status of the document's security analysis (e.g., 'Pending', 'Processing', 'Processed', 'Failed').

hasDecoy.description: Indicates whether a decoy version of the document has been successfully generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the document entity was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the document entity was last updated.

DocumentEntityDetection.title: DocumentEntityDetection
DocumentEntityDetection.description: Stores the results of sensitive entity detection and decoy generation for a specific document, including an array of all detected entities and their decoy counterparts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DocumentEntityDetection entity.

documentId.description: Reference to the Document for which entities were detected. (Relationship: Document 1:1 DocumentEntityDetection)

processingStatus.description: The status of the entity detection process (e.g., 'Completed', 'Failed', 'Pending').

engineUsed.description: Indicates which engine was used for entity detection ('Gemini' or 'Regex').

detectedEntities.description: An array of objects, where each object describes a detected sensitive entity, its original value, decoy value, confidence, and position.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entity detection record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the entity detection record was last updated.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Records all significant actions performed by users and the system for audit, real-time monitoring, and historical analysis on the Admin Dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ActivityLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed the action.

username.description: The username of the user who performed the action.

email.description: The email of the user who performed the action.

action.description: A descriptive code for the action performed.

documentId.description: Reference to the Document if the action pertains to a specific document.

documentName.description: The name of the document if applicable.

status.description: The status of the action (Success, Warning, Alert).

metadata.description: A JSON string containing additional contextual information.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: Tracks active user sessions to monitor concurrent usage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Session entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this session.

username.description: The username associated with this session.

email.description: The email associated with this session.

loginTime.description: Timestamp when the user logged in.

isActive.description: A boolean flag indicating if the session is currently considered active.

definition.description: Stores user profiles and their roles. A user can read/write their own profile. Admins can read/write all user profiles. Includes 'role' for authorization.
Stores metadata for documents uploaded by a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the document.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the document.

definition.description: Stores the sensitive entity detection results.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent document.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent document.

params.name: detectionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the entity detection record.

definition.description: A centralized collection for all system activity logs.
A centralized collection for tracking active user sessions.
